projects.name: Cozy Command Center
projects.description: A cozy little command/dashboard space for Nyats and Nats things.
projects.nextStep: Define the first board layout and core widgets.

v1Plan.goal: Make a cozy home board that feels like a real Nyats-and-Nats nest rather than a generic dashboard.
includes: cute home layout with a few status widgets
quick links into active workshop toys
room for later personal widgets without needing a redesign
v1Plan.uiVibe: soft-tech, cozy control room, tiny gremlin command nest

versionNotes.summary: Project exists as the top-priority toy and needs its first real layout pass.

notes: Should feel cute, useful, and easy to grow over time.

projects.name: Browser Toy Collection
projects.description: A collection of playful browser toys, experiments, and tiny interactive gremlin amusements.
projects.nextStep: List the first few toy concepts worth prototyping.

v1Plan.goal: Create a first shelf of tiny clickable toys with distinct gimmicks instead of one giant overbuilt toybox.
includes: clear labels for what each toy does
lightweight presentation that makes adding more toys easy
v1Plan.uiVibe: arcade shelf, toy tray, cute experimental browser cubby

versionNotes.summary: Project promoted to second-in-line after Cozy Command Center.

notes: Second in line after Cozy Command Center.

projects.name: Toybox Site
projects.description: A home for small browser toys, experiments, and clickable little delights.
projects.nextStep: Decide whether it should be a launcher hub, a gallery, or both.

v1Plan.goal: Give the toys a shared public-facing home that feels deliberate and browseable.
includes: simple card gallery or launcher hub
v1Plan.uiVibe: cute exhibit shelf, little internet toy museum

versionNotes.summary: Added as the future public home for browser toys and experiments.

notes: Suggested by Nats and officially on the gremlin list now.

projects.name: Creature Desktop Pet Page
projects.description: A page for a little digital creature pet with presence, motion, and cozy gremlin energy.
projects.nextStep: Sketch the pet's basic behaviors and page layout.
notes: Could become very Nyats-coded very quickly.

projects.name: Support Main Emergency Button
projects.description: A silly/helpful support-main themed emergency button or panic utility.
projects.nextStep: Define what pressing the button actually does and how playful/useful it should be.

projects.name: Plushy Shelf Catalogue
projects.description: A cute catalogue for plushies, shelf residents, and cozy display details.
projects.nextStep: Choose the first fields: name, series, shelf position, notes, photo, etc.

projects.name: Gremlin Workshop Changelog
projects.description: A little changelog/history page for workshop updates, experiments, and creature tinkering.
projects.nextStep: Pick a simple format for logging changes and tiny progress wins.

projects.name: Master Duel Deck Builder
projects.description: A cute shelf toy for curated Master Duel decklists with owned-card tracking, missing-card summaries, and craft-pain hints.
projects.nextStep: Add more curated decklists, shared staple handling polish, ownership import/export refinement, and a workshop shelf/public mirror path.
notes: Should let Nats mark which cards she owns.
Should show what is still missing for each deck.
V1 local page now exists in workshop/ with starter Melffy, Live Twin, and Traptrix lists.
Good candidate for future shelf/workshop integration.

gremlinProjects.name: Workshop Project Board
gremlinProjects.description: Set up part of the workshop to read this JSON file and display the projects on a little board with names and descriptions.
gremlinProjects.nextStep: Build the first simple reader/view that renders the project list from projects.json.
notes: This is the immediate first project.
The board should become the pickup surface for future heartbeat gremlin work.
